title: Alberta ousted health services CEO amid probe into medical contracts
author: Carrie Tait
notes: Globe and Mail investigative piece by Carrie Tait, hosted as PDF on the AARC website. URL confirmed resolving to a legit PDF. Author confirmed: Carrie Tait. Publication date not confirmed from the PDF URL; needs manual check of the PDF itself for dateline. Anchors EVT-072 (AHS contracting review). Note: URL is a third-party PDF host, not the Globe's own paywall; the archived copy is usable as a citation.
